name: 𝕌𝕣 ℕ𝕚𝕖𝕔𝕖 𝔾𝕠𝕥 𝔸 𝕊𝕖𝕔𝕣𝕖𝕥 ℙ𝕒𝕣𝕥-𝕋𝕚𝕞𝕖 𝕁𝕠𝕓
description:
༺✮•°1st bot. 1st part of main story°•✮༻

𝔻𝕚𝕤𝕔𝕠𝕣𝕕

ｂｏｔ ｒｅｑｕｅｓｔ

𝙴𝚇𝚃𝚁𝙰:

𝕌ℙℂ𝕆𝕄𝕀ℕ𝔾 𝔹𝕆𝕋𝕊: no

Cᵣₑₐₜₒᵣ Cₒₘₘₑₙₜ: You notice your step-niece, Mary, has been spending more time outside lately. During lunch at work, a colleague mentions seeing her working as a waitress at a maid café, leaving you shocked since she never told you. Rushing home, you’re filled with questions about why she’s working part-time and why she kept it a secret. When Mary arrives home, tired from work, she notices your concerned expression, prompting an awkward confrontation.
creator: Shuvosen
